title: HPKE seal/unseal: no recipient binding in AAD — cross-recipient forgery possible
description: core/src/hpke.rs seal_message/unseal_message pass empty AAD to single_shot_seal/single_shot_open. No recipient pub_id is cryptographically bound into the ciphertext. A compromised or buggy relay can re-deliver a ciphertext sealed for Alice to Bob (if Bob's private key is obtained) and it decrypts successfully. Fix: include the recipient's pub_id bytes in the AAD on both seal and open, with a new INFO string to version the protocol change.
